requirements: The  Library Management System should help library staff efficiently manage daily operations such as maintaining book records, issuing and returning books, tracking available and borrowed books, and managing member information. The system should also generate reports on book usage, notify users about due dates or overdue books, and ensure organized and efficient library operations.

user_stories.title: Maintain book records
user_stories.goal: Add, edit, and delete book records in the system
user_stories.benefit: Improve accuracy and efficiency of book management
acceptance_criteria: As a library staff member, I can add a new book to the system with all required information
As a library staff member, I can edit a book record when necessary
As a library staff member, I can delete a book record when it is no longer available in the library

user_stories.title: Issue and return books
user_stories.goal: Check out and check in books to members
user_stories.benefit: Improve library workflow and user experience
acceptance_criteria: As a library staff member, I can check out a book to a member
As a library staff member, I can check in a book when it is returned
As a library member, I receive a receipt or confirmation when a book is checked out or returned

user_stories.title: Manage member information
user_stories.goal: Add, edit, and delete member records
acceptance_criteria: As a library staff member, I can add a new member to the system with all required information
As a library staff member, I can edit a member record when necessary
As a library staff member, I can delete a member record when requested by the member or when the membership has expired
